title: trifolium tomentosum subsp. macrosphaerum
intro: Trifolium tomentosum subsp. macrosphaerum, also known as the large-flowered milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Trifolium tomentosum subsp. macrosphaerum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which are used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
